question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/controller/HooksController.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged external user enumerate all hook configurations for any arbitrary account by supplying any valid ownerId path variable with no authentication check, thereby discovering which accounts have gossip-prevention hooks registered and what hook IDs are active, causing full disclosure of gossip-prevention policy for every account on the network?
